creator: bofh@freebsd.org
text: Previously I have updated the configuration of nano and vim and was looking forward to update the old emacs configuration to a match some modern Emacs configs and specifically as we have move to asciidocs from xml/sgml the configs are no longer valid for our purpose. However currently we are using igor for spell check. I am planning to replace igor with other spellchecking like aspell or hunspell. aspell is my preferred choice as it has support for CamelCase. And this will also require changes in our doc metaport docproj. So can anyone please share some feedback on this matter?
